user.title: Notification Center
user.description: Set how long active notifications remain available, how long mutes last, and which mobile devices receive notifications.

error.single_instance_allowed: Only one Notification Center instance is supported.
error.test_failed: The notification test could not be sent. Check the Home Assistant log for details.

data_description.name: Friendly name shown in dashboards and mobile notifications.
data_description.id: Unique stable key used by dashboard cards and services.
data_description.mode: Boolean evaluates on/off. Outcome evaluates a named value returned by the template.
data_description.entity: Optional shortcut for Boolean notifications. Select the entity whose on/off state should be checked.
data_description.template: Jinja that returns true/false, on/off, or an outcome key. Leave the entity shortcut to handle a simple Boolean check.
data_description.outcomes: JSON object keyed by the value returned from the entity or template. Each value can define active, title, message, icon, severity, and CSS.
data_description.devices: Select one or more mobile devices. Leave empty to disable delivery for this notification.
data_description.persistence: How long this notification remains active before it expires. Leave blank to use the panel default.
data_description.mute_duration: How long this notification stays hidden after it is muted. Leave blank to use the panel default.

data_description.selected_id: Choose a notification to update its entity, Jinja template, outcomes, devices, and timing settings.

test_notification.title: Test notification delivery
test_notification.description: Send a test message to the selected notification's configured mobile devices without changing its active or muted state.

data_description.selected_id: Choose the notification whose configured message and target devices you want to test.

test_outcome.title: Choose test outcome
test_outcome.description: The test sends the selected outcome's title and message. Current template result evaluates the notification exactly as it is now.
